title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at WOW Skin Science

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at WOW Skin Science
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with WOW Skin Science! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About WOW Skin Science:
WOW Skin Science is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
